writing-skill.intent: Create a privacy-preserving local LLM writing-style skill for named reusable profiles, example intake, neutral calibration, eval scaffolding, and profile inheritance.

feat/skill-scaffold-schemas.intent: Create the portable writing-style skill scaffold, baseline SKILL.md shell, artifact templates, conservative config defaults, and metadata alignment.

feat/core-skill-workflow.intent: Implement the complete writing-style skill workflow for profile creation, sanitization, calibration, saving, forking, invocation, settings changes, neutral prompts, and feedback rubric.
